title: Mini LED Torch: 8 Pack Portable USB Rechargeable Small LED Flashlight, Mini Flashlight, Keyring Torches, Childrens Torches, Ideal for Camping Hiking Traveling Cycling Outdoors Party
features: 【Portable Small LED Torch】Mini LED torch only 5.2x2.2cm and 18g, fit in your pocket or purse, allowing for quick access.This led keyring torch is small and easy to carry, you can put it in your pocket or attach it to your key chain, bag.The portable size is perfect for outdoor camping, hiking, hunting, backpacking, fishing, or emergency situations.

【High Performance Torches Led】Mini LED Torch 0.5W LED bright, the beam can throw over 10m. mini keyring torch has efficient LED light chip that can provide constant light for hours. This torches for camping can be used for family life, outdoor camping, patrolling, caving, night fishing, hiking, night riding etc.

【USB Rechargeable】Mini LED Torch with high-quality ABS housing is strong, wear-resistant, long-lasting and stable. usb mini torch can be fully charged from the USB port of any device. Charges in 10 minutes and lasts 150 minutes, these durable torches will save you the costs of constantly buying new ones. You can keep two for daily use and the other two as spares.

【Eight-pack Mini Torch Gift】Here come with 8 Mini LED Torch in vibrant colours: sky blue, green, yellow, pink, orange, purple. You will get four wonderful torches for the price of one. A nice gift for family and friends on Christmas, birthdays, etc.

【Easy to Use】The child torch has a twist switch, its ABS plastic housing is non-slip and shatterproof, Rotary switch design, turn the switch to activate the LED kids flashlight. Even children can use it easily. Our mini LED torches are built with a non-slip grip and comes with a key ring attachment, it very easy to carry around even for kids.
description: Vaileal Mini LED Torch - 8 Pack Portable USB Rechargeable Small LED Flashlight, Mini LED Flashlight, Keyring Torches Led, Mini Childrens Torches, Ideal for Camping Hiking Traveling Cycling Outdoors Party Feature: 1. It’s very convenient to use. 2.Super Bright, mini LED torch can emits bright light and provide constant light for hours. 3. Mini LED Torch USB Rechargeable: Remove the torch’s bottom cover and directly plug torch’s USB connector into any USB socket device, such as computer, mobile phone charger and car USB interface etc. 4. The Mini LED Torch portable size is perfect for outdoor camping, hiking, hunting, backpacking, fishing, or emergency situations. They're great gifts for kids, family and friends. When the light become dusky, please stop using. Please reuse the flashlight after the full charge. 5. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will reply within 24 hours.
